name: et3am
description: Et3am - Food Donation Platform with i18n support

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:watch: npm run test:frontend -- --watch & npm run test:backend -- --watch
